description: Google Drive + Workspace MCP — Docs, Sheets, Slides, Shared Drives, Labels, Approvals, DWD
name: io.github.us-all/google-drive

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client ID. Required for OAuth refresh-token auth method.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret. Required for OAuth refresh-token auth method.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth refresh token. Required for OAuth refresh-token auth method.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Path to service account JSON key. Required for SA + DWD auth method (alternative to OAuth).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Workspace user email to impersonate (DWD). Required when using service account auth.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_IMPERSONATE_USER

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated OAuth scopes. Default scopes cover Drive + Docs + Sheets + Slides read/write.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DRIVE_SCOPES

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable write tools. Default read-only.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DRIVE_ALLOW_WRITE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist. Default: all categories enabled.
environmentVariables.name: GD_TOOLS
